steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which conclusion is supported by the data. The passage establishes that queen honeybees exceeded the positive-charge threshold needed to attract stamens. The graph shows charge levels for multiple bee species relative to that threshold.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'attraction fails despite high charge': contradicts the data, which shows that meeting the threshold produces attraction. ✗
  • Choice B — 'bees repel stamens': no basis for repulsion is shown in the graph or passage. ✗
  • Choice C — 'red mason bees can also attract stamens': the graph shows red mason bee charge meets or exceeds the same threshold as queen honeybees, so stamen attraction follows. ✓
  • Choice D — 'a specific threshold value': the graph does not indicate the exact numerical threshold. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
